source: Open RN / WisTech Open nursing textbooks
licenseNote: Generally CC BY 4.0 except where otherwise noted. Verify page/activity/media-level exceptions.
allowedUse: Can copy/adapt/remix compatible content with attribution, license notice, and modification note.
recommendedUse: Primary OER concept source for building original PN-scope questions; verbatim use is possible only after license check.

source: U.S. federal public-domain health materials such as CDC/FDA/NIH
licenseNote: Many federal-authored materials are public domain, but pages may contain third-party/contractor content.
allowedUse: Use verified public-domain facts/text with attribution; avoid images/tables unless clearly public-domain.
recommendedUse: Clinical rationale/reference support, not usually direct NCLEX-style qbank items.

licenseNote: Official materials are copyrighted and exam content is confidential. Terms are restrictive.
allowedUse: Use test plans, client-needs taxonomy, item-type descriptions, and clinical judgment model as framework references.
recommendedUse: Do not copy sample questions, exam preview content, case screenshots, or PDFs into the app without written permission.

licenseNote: Visible/free does not mean reusable; recalled NCLEX content creates exam-security and copyright risk.
allowedUse: Market research only; no copying, scraping, close paraphrasing, or importing.
recommendedUse: Reject and flag source concern if any item resembles UWorld, Archer, ATI, Kaplan, Saunders, Bootcamp, Quizlet dumps, Reddit/Telegram dumps, or instructor test banks.
